testcase.name: Features Page - Company Panel › should display three panels on page load
Features Page - Company Panel › should add a company when name is entered and Enter is pressed
Features Page - Company Panel › should activate company and show Active badge
Features Page - Company Panel › should show placeholder when no company is selected
Features Page - Company Panel › should delete company when confirmed
Features Page - Company Panel › should not delete company when confirmation is dismissed
Features Page - Feature Panel › should enable Feature panel after product is selected
Features Page - Feature Panel › should add a feature and display it in the list

failure.message: feature-panel.spec.ts:52:7 should add a feature and display it in the list

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › ui/feature-panel.spec.ts:52:7 › Features Page - Feature Panel › should add a feature and display it in the list
TimeoutError: page.waitForResponse: Timeout 60000ms exceeded while waiting for event "response"
at pages/features-page.ts:213
211 | // Set up response listener BEFORE clicking button 212 | // Embedding can take >10s, so use a 60 second timeout > 213 | const responsePromise = this.page.waitForResponse( | ^ 214 | resp => resp.url().includes('/api/features') && resp.request().method() === 'POST', 215 | { timeout: 60000 } 216 | ); at FeaturesPage.addFeature (/Users/yeongmi/dev/qa/my-atlas/qa/pages/features-page.ts:213:39) at /Users/yeongmi/dev/qa/my-atlas/qa/ui/feature-panel.spec.ts:57:5
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── test-results/ui-feature-panel-Features--a6223--and-display-it-in-the-list-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: Features Page - Feature Panel › should show "Creating (embedding...)" state while feature is being created

failure.message: feature-panel.spec.ts:67:7 should show "Creating (embedding...)" state while feature is being created

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › ui/feature-panel.spec.ts:67:7 › Features Page - Feature Panel › should show "Creating (embedding...)" state while feature is being created
TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 60000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Add Feature")') to be visible
at pages/features-page.ts:294
292 | // Wait for "Add Feature" button to reappear (not "Creating (embedding...)") 293 | // Use selector instead of waitForFunction since we can't use locators in waitForFunction > 294 | await this.page.waitForSelector('button:has-text("Add Feature")', { timeout: 60000 }); | ^ 295 | } 296 | 297 | /** at FeaturesPage.waitForFeatureCreation (/Users/yeongmi/dev/qa/my-atlas/qa/pages/features-page.ts:294:21) at /Users/yeongmi/dev/qa/my-atlas/qa/ui/feature-panel.spec.ts:91:24

testcase.name: Features Page - Feature Panel › should show placeholder when no product is selected

failure.message: feature-panel.spec.ts:186:7 should show placeholder when no product is selected

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › ui/feature-panel.spec.ts:186:7 › Features Page - Feature Panel › should show placeholder when no product is selected

testcase.name: Features Page - Product Panel › should enable Product panel after company is selected
Features Page - Product Panel › should add a WEB product
Features Page - Product Panel › should add a MOBILE product
Features Page - Product Panel › should display both products after adding two products
Features Page - Product Panel › should highlight selected product with blue border
Features Page - Product Panel › should delete product when confirmed

failure.message: product-panel.spec.ts:98:7 should delete product when confirmed

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › ui/product-panel.spec.ts:98:7 › Features Page - Product Panel › should delete product when confirmed
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
Expected: true Received: false
102 | // Verify product exists 103 | let productExists = await featuresPage.productList.getByText(productName).isVisible(); > 104 | expect(productExists).toBe(true); | ^ 105 | 106 | await featuresPage.deleteProduct(productName); 107 | at /Users/yeongmi/dev/qa/my-atlas/qa/ui/product-panel.spec.ts:104:27

testcase.name: Features Page - Product Panel › should show placeholder when no product is selected
